nasb.text: And I heard something like a voice in the center of the four living creatures saying, “A quart of wheat for a denarius, and three quarts of barley for a denarius; and do not damage the oil and the wine.”

esv.text: And I heard what seemed to be a voice in the midst of the four living creatures, saying, “A quart of wheat for a denarius, and three quarts of barley for a denarius, and do not harm the oil and wine!”

cnv.text: 我聽見在四個活物中間，仿佛有聲音說：“一公升小麥賣一個銀幣，三公升大麥賣一個銀幣，油和酒也不可糟蹋。”

ccb.text: 我又听见四个活物中好像有声音说：“一升小麦值一个银币，三升大麦也同价，油和酒都不要糟蹋。”

csbs.text: 我就听见在四个活物中间好像有声音说：“一升小麦一个银币，三升大麦一个银币；油和酒不可糟蹋！”
